name: Oriental Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork shoulder into 1/4-inch strips.
2. Mix pork, 1/2 cup water, orange juice, salt, pepper, and soy sauce in a 2-quart casserole. Cover and microwave on medium (50%) until pork is tender, about 16 to 20 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes.
3. Stir in drained water chestnuts, bean sprouts, and cabbage. Cover and microwave on high (100%) until cabbage is crisp-tender, 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Blend cornstarch and 1 tablespoon cold water in a 4-cup glass measure. Drain juices from meat mixture into the cornstarch mixture; stir well.
5. Microwave on high (100%) until the mixture boils and thickens, about 3 to 4 minutes, stirring every minute or so.
6. Pour over meat and vegetables. Sprinkle with chopped green onions and serve over hot rice.
